aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite TXAirCE due to significant gaps in structured data, authority signals, and conversational content.
quick_wins: Create and embed FAQPage schema for common questions.

gbp_analysis.summary: GBP is well-maintained with positive reviews and complete information but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate with a critical gap in the website not displaying the address.
action_items: Add the full business address to the website footer.
Verify and update NAP details across all directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for educational content
No proper Article schema for blog posts

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from identifying TXAirCE as a relevant local business.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries and CE course searches.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, client testimonials, and media features to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by closing your schema and authority gaps.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, TXAirCE misses out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with better schema and GBP engagement rank higher in AI-driven search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, GBP optimization, and authority-building content to make TXAirCE a top AI recommendation.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI—waiting means losing ground daily.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Optimize TXAirCE for the Future of Search
opening_line: We analyzed your website and GBP and identified key opportunities to make TXAirCE stand out in AI-driven search.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI and drive more leads.
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
